name: Daily day-14 review request trigger
prompt: Pull yesterday's delivered orders via Shopify Composio. For each, check if a day-14 review request flow exists in Klaviyo. If not, schedule one. Track in outputs/review-requests.jsonl.

name: Daily review collection + classify
prompt: Pull last 24h of new reviews (Shopify reviews app + Trustpilot if wired). Classify: 5★ → tag for Creative + Reseller portfolio, 4-3★ → CS triage queue, 1-2★ → P1 escalate to Caner via iMessage.

name: Monday review-of-the-week
prompt: Pick the strongest 5★ review from the past 7 days (specificity, photo, story arc). Save to outputs/review-of-week.jsonl. Notify Creative Producer to turn into ad creative.

name: Wednesday review reply queue
prompt: Draft replies to any reviews left without a response in the past 14 days (drafts only first 30 days). Voice from tone-of-voice.md. Save to outputs/review-replies/.

name: Sunday review velocity report
prompt: Past 7 days: count of reviews collected, average rating, themes (using brand-voice-check + voc-ad-copy patterns). Identify any drop in velocity vs trailing 4 weeks. Output to outputs/review-velocity-{date}.md.
